general_description.description: A succinct 4-6 sentence description of how the colors have changed

directors.description: List of movie directors whose work this color grading resembles. Only include if 100% certain.

movies.description: List of specific movies whose color grading this resembles. Only include if 100% certain.

film_emulsions.description: List of film emulsions that could produce similar color characteristics. Only include if 100% certain.
